title: Amendments to the Decision on State Aids for Investments
bodyHtml:
Amendments have been made to the Decision on State Aids for Investments numbered 2012/3305, and the list of machinery and equipment ineligible for customs duty exemption has been updated with the addition of 20 new items.

In the event that incentive certificates are canceled or partial sanctions are applied, the interest or profit share support paid in excess to the investors will be reclaimed from the investor, along with interest calculated in accordance with the late payment rates specified in Article 51 of Law No. 6183, starting from the date of each support payment.

Investments in photovoltaic solar panel production will be eligible for support if they are integrated with a solar cell produced from the ingot slicing stage or an earlier stage of the production process, provided that the production capacity of the cell is not exceeded.

The following items have been added to the list of machinery and equipment ineligible for customs duty exemption (Annex 8):

Annex 8: Newly Added Items

  • 8441.10.20.00.00: Other machines for cutting paper and cardboard lengthwise or crosswise
  • 8441.10.30.90.00: Straight guillotines for paper and cardboard; excluding those used in photography
  • 8441.10.70.90.00: Other cutting machines for paper and cardboard; excluding those used in photography
  • 8451.29.00.00.00: Laundry drying machines; dry laundry capacity > 10 kg
  • 8451.30.00.00.00: Ironing machines and presses for the textile industry (including heat-sealing presses)
  • 8451.40.00.00.12: Bleaching machines for the textile industry
  • 8451.40.00.00.13: Dyeing machines for the textile industry
  • 8451.50.00.00.11: Machines for winding fabrics into rolls
  • 8451.50.00.00.12: Machines for cutting fabrics into rolls
  • 8451.50.00.00.19: Machines for opening, folding, or cutting fabrics (excluding those for cutting into rolls)
  • 8451.80.30.00.00: Finishing and processing machines for the textile industry
  • 8451.80.80.00.00: Other machines for the textile industry
  • 8464.10.00.00.00: Sawing machines for stone, ceramics, concrete, asbestos cement, or similar mineral materials
  • 8464.20.19.00.00: Other grinding or polishing machines for glass
  • 8464.20.80.00.00: Grinding or polishing machines for stone, ceramics, concrete, asbestos cement, and similar mineral materials (excluding glass)
  • 8464.90.00.00.00: Machines for processing stone, ceramics, concrete, asbestos cement, or similar mineral materials in other ways
  • 8477.20.00.00.00: Extrusion machines for rubber or plastic
  • 8477.80.95.00.00: Cutting, splitting, and peeling machines for rubber or plastic
  • 8479.40.00.00.00: Machines for making ropes, cables, or wires
  • 8514.19.80.00.11: Other ovens and furnaces used in industry and heated by resistance


For the Decision on the Amendment to the Decision on State Aids for Investments (Decision No: 8860) and the updated Annex 8, click here.
